name: SHARD: cell-keyed residual splitting for alignment-resistant private dense retrieval

description: arXiv:2606.27976v3 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Dense retrieval systems expose document geometry when vector stores are compromised, and a global protective transform can often be aligned from known pairs. We study SHARD, which splits PCA coordinates into a short routing prefix and a residual protected by independent cell-local orthogonal keys. It supports CKKS ciphertext--plaintext r...
author: Sergey Kurilenko
